description_long: This house features a rectangular layout with a central open courtyard, visible from the front and rear. The exterior walls are finished in a light, smooth material, likely concrete or stucco, and the structure is surrounded by green lawn patches on two sides. The courtyard contains a prominent palm tree and some smaller plants, adding a touch of greenery to the otherwise minimalist design. The building has a flat roof and multiple rooms arranged around the courtyard, with windows on the front-facing wall. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The house appears to be single-story and is designed for urban or suburban environments.
description: A modern, single-story house with a central open courtyard, flat roof, and minimalist light-colored exterior. Features include a palm tree in the courtyard and windows on the front wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central courtyard with a palm tree, and windows on the front wall.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the flat roof, the depth of the house, and partial visibility of the courtyard greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, flat roof, and the courtyard's open space with the palm tree visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the flat roof, side lawn, and partial courtyard visibility.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with no visible steps or porch, featuring a flat facade and minimal ornamentation.
